title: selaginella sericea var. sericea
intro: Selaginella sericea var. sericea, also known as the silky spikemoss, is a species of plant within the Selaginellaceae family, typically found in the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The silky spikemoss has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in the treatment of various infections. Selaginella sericea var. sericea is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Asian herbal remedies.
